_comment: Halts vite's tsconfig auto-discovery walk for files under mobile/lib so vite/esbuild don't try to resolve mobile/tsconfig.json's expo/tsconfig.base extends (mobile/node_modules isn't installed in CI's root-only npm ci). Doesn't affect the main mobile typecheck — `tsc -p mobile` uses mobile/tsconfig.json as the project root and ignores nested tsconfigs in subdirectories. Pure-helper modules under mobile/lib are imported by the supabase tests via vitest and don't need expo types or path aliases.
